query:
SELECT 'COURSES' as type, id, title, description, NULL as content FROM courses
UNION ALL
SELECT 'MODULES' as type, id, title, description, NULL as content FROM modules
UNION ALL
SELECT 'VIDEOS' as type, id, title, description, video_url as content FROM videos
UNION ALL
SELECT 'QUIZZES' as type, id, title, description, NULL as content FROM quizzes
ORDER BY type, id;
